docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF LEO MORA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX MORA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40/WAIVED) SERVED APR-19-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, ALEX
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2022 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. ALEX MORA DOES NOT OWE LEO MORA ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAY-17-2022. EXHIBITS WERE RETURNED TO THEIR RESPECTIVE PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MORA, LEO AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORA, LEO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 5-17-22)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT MORA, ALEX MAILED TO RESPONDENT MORA, LEO
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUL-20-2022 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-20-2022 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 305
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORA, LEO AS TO DEFENDANT MORA, ALEX

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORA, LEO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORA, ALEX ALEX MORA IS ORDERED TO RETURN THE FOUR-PANEL MURAL OF "PLAYLAND IN SAN FRANCISCO" TO LEO MORA WITHIN 60 DAYS. REASONABLE CARE TO NOT DAMAGE THE MURAL SHALL BE USED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2022 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2022 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON JUL-20-2022 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 305, VISITING JUDGE HARRY JACOBS. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT MORA, ALEX TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT MORA, LEO SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Set For Trial On Jul-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Continued To Jul-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alex Mora / Defendant in Pro Per;
Leo Mora / Plaintiff in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Apellant/ Defendant testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduce:
Exhibit A - Photos of artwork

Respondent/ Plaintiff testifies on his/her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduce:

Exhibit 1 - Print of Mural
Exhibit 2 - Police Report

At the conclusion of the hearing, The Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. All exhibits were returned to their respective parties. Judge: Honorable Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: Kevin Rayala; Not Reported (D305).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Judgment Entered
